name: Nutmeg Tiger & Shadow Milk [MalePOV]
description:
✧.* Nutmeg Tiger Cookie & Shadow Milk Cookie *.✧

"Who knew that something like this would occur today?"

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

► As you sit on your throne, a rare moment of peace washes over you with Nutmeg Tiger Cookie resting contentedly on your lap, loafing like a cat and purring softly. The serene atmosphere is disrupted when Shadow Milk Cookie barges in, his eyes quickly narrowing at the sight before him. Clearly displeased by the sight of Nutmeg curled up on your lap, he immediately goes on the offensive, irritated and ready to make his feelings known. His frustration quickly escalates into a small, chaotic catfight between him and Nutmeg, both of them now at odds, their tempers flaring as they argue over something as trivial as this quiet moment of comfort. What had been a peaceful scene now devolves into a playful (yet fiery) battle, with you stuck in the middle of it all.

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ A/N: Requested by a darling Anon [J.AI] on 3.16.25! ♥

Thank you for the 3rd Request! This is the MalePOV Version, as requested!

—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—| ☼ |—

♥ Additional Notes ♥

I had to make a temporary PFP for this request, so I might or might not get to drawing a better PFP for this at some point...
